response.justification: Candidate has deep, broad software engineering experience but lacks the core mandatory requirements for this role. There is no professional C++ experience on Windows in the recent 5–10 years (only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments in 2007–2008), no SQL Server/Oracle expertise, and no exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domains. The tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) and domain background (geo-data, direct mail, AI tooling) do not align with the requirements.
strengths: Extensive senior-level software engineering experience across multiple stacks
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Demonstrated communication skills via talks, workshops, and teaching
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ on Windows experience (only ~6 months in 2007–2008)
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; no fixed income or capital markets domain exposure
No Summit platform, Kafka/MQ, or relevant financial-systems background

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
